agent_analysis:
**THURSDAY STATUS — ELEVATED**

All 3 positions stuck at -12% with stocks flat (+0.0%). This is pure theta bleed — exactly what we expect on day 4 when charm acceleration kicks in. With only 1 day to expiry, these calls need significant moves tomorrow just to break even.

**Key observations:**
- No position hit the 15% Thursday target (all underwater)
- All below the -15% exit threshold I flag on Thursdays
- Charm has likely pushed deltas from ~0.35 entry to ~0.20 or lower
- Tomorrow's theta will eat another 4-5% minimum

**RECOMMENDATION: CLOSE ALL THREE**

Exit MSFT, MAR, and SOFI calls at market. Lock in -12% vs watching theta burn another 5% overnight. These need 2%+ moves on Friday just to recover premium — low probability with flat momentum and accelerating decay.
